critical_illness_cover.description: Covered for 35 critical illnesses including cancer, heart attack, stroke, kidney failure

outpatient_opd.description: Not specified in schedule - check individual scheme

value_added_services: Flash App discounts at Nawaloka, Lanka, Ceylon Hospitals

outpatient_opd.spectacles_note: Eye specialist prescription required, once in 2 years, no sunglasses/contact lenses/computer glasses

exclusions: Sunglasses, contact lenses, computer glasses, reading glasses

policies.address: Zone A, Export Processing Zone, Katunayake

spectacles_employee_only.conditions: Prescription from eye specialist, once in 2 years, no sunglasses/contact lenses/computer glasses

Individual Health.description: Individual health insurance covering the main policyholder only (self).
eligible_members: Self only — no family/dependents covered unless upgraded to Family Floater

dental.note: Basic dental: fillings, extractions, scaling only

spectacle.note: Once every 2 years, prescription from registered eye specialist required, no sunglasses or contact lenses

indoor.note: Hospitalization covered up to sum insured

Individual Health.self_only_note: Dependents (spouse, children, parents) are NOT covered under individual policy. Claims from family members should be rejected unless they have their own individual policy.
Individual Health.renewal: Annual renewal — limits reset each year

Family Floater.description: Single shared sum insured covering the entire family under one policy.

opd.note: Shared OPD limit across all family members

dental.note: All covered family members, once per year per member

spectacle.note: Main member and spouse only, once every 2 years, eye specialist prescription required

indoor.note: Hospitalization — shared sum insured for the entire family

Family Floater.shared_limit_note: Once the shared sum insured is exhausted by any family member, no further claims accepted until policy renewal.
Family Floater.dependent_eligibility: Dependent children are covered until age 25 (or marriage, whichever earlier). Parents must be opted in at inception.

Corporate.description: Group corporate health policy for company employees under employer scheme.
eligible_members: Spouse (if employer has opted for family coverage)

opd.note: Employee OPD covered; family OPD only if employer opted for family coverage

dental.note: Employee only by default unless family dental opted by employer

spectacle.note: Employee only, once every 2 years, original prescription required

indoor.note: Employee and opted-in family members covered for hospitalization

Corporate.scheme_note: Benefits vary by employee grade/scheme (e.g., DGM and above vs staff grade). Check employer scheme schedule.
Corporate.participation: 100% employee participation required for group policy

Senior Citizen.description: Health insurance for senior citizens aged 60-75 years.

dental.note: Dental not typically covered under senior citizen policies

indoor.note: Hospitalization covered — pre-existing conditions may apply extended waiting period

Senior Citizen.age_note: Entry age 60-75. Renewal permissible up to age 80 with continuous coverage. Claims from persons under 60 should not be under this policy type.

eligibility.participation: 100% of eligible employees must be included

waiting_periods.sickness: 30 days from date of commencement or inclusion date
waiting_periods.childbirth: 10 months from date of commencement or inclusion date

claim_requirements.indoor: Original bills, Discharge summary, Doctor referral
claim_requirements.opd: Original bills, Doctor prescription, Investigation reports
claim_requirements.dental: Original bills, BDS/DDS/DMD qualified dentist required
claim_requirements.spectacles: Original prescription from registered eye specialist, once in 2 years

excluded_items: Food, toiletries, sanitary items, cosmetics, diapers
Sunglasses, contact lenses, computer glasses, reading glasses
Drug addiction and alcohol addiction treatment
Pre-existing conditions before waiting period completes
general_conditions.covered_hospitals: Private Medical Institutions registered with PHSRC (Private Hospitals Service Regulatory Commission)
general_conditions.cashless_facility: Available at empaneled hospitals only for indoor admissions
general_conditions.claim_intimation: All hospital admissions must be intimated within 24 hours to OPD Insurance (0112-636636)
general_conditions.reimbursement: Original bills required for reimbursement claims
